headlines.headline: 'It was a stomp!' Stephen A. doesn't hold back on Lakers after loss to OKC
headlines.description: Stephen A. Smith rips into the Lakers after Los Angeles was blown out by 43 points in loss to the Thunder.

headlines.headline: 'The Hoop Collective': Episodes of Brian Windhorst's NBA podcast

headlines.headline: Caleb Downs and the NFL draft: How high is too high to take a safety?
